name: pob-mcp-suite
description: Monorepo for the PoB MCP server, bundled Path of Building fork, and Codex plugin marketplace package.

scripts.test:focused: npm --prefix packages/pob-mcp test -- tests/unit/buildHandlers.test.ts tests/unit/pobLuaBridge.test.ts tests/unit/luaHandlers.test.ts --runInBand
scripts.validate: npm run build && npm run test:focused && npm run validate:market && npm run validate:shell
